pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.2.0-RC2 to align with Java 21 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to enforce JDK 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features/compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Enforcer rule to require Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build would fail to enforce the new JDK 21 requirement if the rule remained set to [17,18).

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Springfox dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI starter for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace); code using Swagger annotations will fail to compile or run without this replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove mockito-inline dependency in favor of standard Mockito or ByteBuddy.
pom.xml.why_exists: mockito-inline is deprecated/removed in newer Mockito versions; using it causes compilation or runtime errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Milestones repository to resolve Spring Boot 3.2.0-RC2 artifacts.
pom.xml.why_exists: The release repository does not contain RC versions; build fails to resolve dependencies without this.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JaCoCo version to 0.8.11 for Java 21 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions do not support Java 21 class files.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add -parameters compiler argument to preserve parameter names.
pom.xml.why_exists: Required for Spring Boot 3 dependency injection and other frameworks that rely on parameter names.
